CVE-2025-68938.title: Gitea before 1.25.2 mishandles authorization for deletion of rele ...
CVE-2025-68938.description: Gitea before 1.25.2 mishandles authorization for deletion of releases.

CVE-2025-69413.title: In Gitea before 1.25.2, /api/v1/user has different responses for  ...
CVE-2025-69413.description: In Gitea before 1.25.2, /api/v1/user has different responses for failed authentication depending on whether a username exists.

CVE-2026-0798.title: Gitea may send release notification emails for private repositori ...
CVE-2026-0798.description: Gitea may send release notification emails for private repositories to users whose access has been revoked. When a repository is changed from public to private, users who previously watched the repository may continue to receive release notifications, potentially disclosing release titles, tags, and content.

CVE-2026-20736.title: Gitea does not properly verify repository context when deleting a ...
CVE-2026-20736.description: Gitea does not properly verify repository context when deleting attachments. A user who previously uploaded an attachment to a repository may be able to delete it after losing access to that repository by making the request through a different repository they can access.

CVE-2026-20750.title: Gitea does not properly validate project ownership in organizatio ...
CVE-2026-20750.description: Gitea does not properly validate project ownership in organization project operations. A user with project write access in one organization may be able to modify projects belonging to a different organization.

CVE-2026-20800.title: Gitea's notification API does not re-validate repository access p ...
CVE-2026-20800.description: Gitea's notification API does not re-validate repository access permissions when returning notification details. After a user's access to a private repository is revoked, they may still view issue and pull request titles through previously received notifications.

CVE-2026-20883.title: Gitea's stopwatch API does not re-validate repository access perm ...
CVE-2026-20883.description: Gitea's stopwatch API does not re-validate repository access permissions. After a user's access to a private repository is revoked, they may still view issue titles and repository names through previously started stopwatches.

CVE-2026-20888.title: Gitea does not properly verify authorization when canceling sched ...
CVE-2026-20888.description: Gitea does not properly verify authorization when canceling scheduled auto-merges via the web interface. A user with read access to pull requests may be able to cancel auto-merges scheduled by other users.

CVE-2026-20897.title: Gitea does not properly validate repository ownership when deleti ...
CVE-2026-20897.description: Gitea does not properly validate repository ownership when deleting Git LFS locks. A user with write access to one repository may be able to delete LFS locks belonging to other repositories.

CVE-2026-20904.title: Gitea does not properly validate ownership when toggling OpenID U ...
CVE-2026-20904.description: Gitea does not properly validate ownership when toggling OpenID URI visibility. An authenticated user may be able to change the visibility settings of other users' OpenID identities.

CVE-2026-20912.title: Gitea does not properly validate repository ownership when linkin ...
CVE-2026-20912.description: Gitea does not properly validate repository ownership when linking attachments to releases. An attachment uploaded to a private repository could potentially be linked to a release in a different public repository, making it accessible to unauthorized users.

CVE-2025-68938.title: Gitea before 1.25.2 mishandles authorization for deletion of rele ...
CVE-2025-68938.description: Gitea before 1.25.2 mishandles authorization for deletion of releases.
